{{Quote|For years, Captain, we have patrolled this sector—seeing few battles—gaining fewer glories. But I have a feeling about this...!|Nizzon, to Plikk|<ref name="marvel46" />}}
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Nizzon''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served as the [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] for [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Plikk]] on a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Nizzon's [[Starship/Legends|ship]] patrolled a remote [[Sector/Legends|sector]] for [[Standard year/Legends|years]] with little action, but on one loop in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Nikkon discovered a small rent in the dimensional fabric that aroused great curiosity. Plikk and Nizzon gathered their [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] and blasted the rent open, passing through to discover the [[City of Dreams]], a utopian dreamscape created through psychic energy from former [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] hero [[Cody Sunn-Childe]]. Nizzon's fleet attacked and destroyed the city, but afterwards found that they did not have the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] power to escape Sunn-Childe's pocket dimension, trapping them there for good.<ref name="marvel46" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nizzon first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 46|''Star Wars'' (1977) 46]], written by [[John Marc DeMatteis]] and released in [[1981]]. In the issue, Nizzon was illustrated by [[Carmine Infantino]].<ref name="marvel46" />
